{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ozriel’s Soulsmith inheritance
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]]'s [[Soulsmith inheritance]] is a potential prize.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel’s Soulsmith inheritance]] is something [[Lindon]] wishes he had taken.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
